act1.name: The Forest & Castle
act1.palette: Warm greens, golden sunlight, mossy grays, amber accents. Soft fantasy woodland with crumbling stone structures.

act2.name: The Screaming Caverns
act2.palette: Deep blues, glowing crystals, dark purples, bioluminescent teal. Underground cavern with bureaucratic office elements.

act3.name: The Rite of Administrative Closure
act3.palette: Twilight purples, corrupted golds, petrified grays, magical aurora greens. Decaying grandeur with bureaucratic surrealism.

promptPrefix: GRPZA, pixel art game background, 2D side-scrolling adventure game,
promptSuffix: , detailed pixel art, retro game aesthetic, clean lines, vibrant colors
spritePromptPrefix: GRPZA, pixel art game sprite, 2D character,
spritePromptSuffix: , white background, game asset, clean pixel art, transparent background ready
itemPromptPrefix: GRPZA, pixel art game item icon, 2D,
itemPromptSuffix: , white background, game asset, clean pixel art, centered, small object

shared.description: 2 shared layers per act: sky and mid-ground. Same across all rooms in an act.

unique.description: 1 unique ground layer per room. Shows room-specific terrain and features.

seedStrategy: Each room gets a fixed seed for reproducibility. Seeds are stored in art-manifest.json. Re-running with same seed + prompt produces identical output.
